titleStmt.title: SII 18.86: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 86. (B.K. No. 43 of 1933-34.) GAḶAGANĀTH, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in the temple of Gaḷagēsvara.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 3, Siddhārtha, Chaitra śu, Pūrṇimā, Sunday, Saṁkrānti. The details are irregular. The tithi cited corresponds to A.D. 1079, March 20, Wednesday. The Saṁkrānti (Mēsha) however fell on the following Sunday, the 24th.

It records a gift of thirty gadyāṇas for the maṇḍapa of the god Gaḷagēśvaradēva made by the musician Barmayya who is stated to be an expert in thirty-two rāgas as also, in music, dancing and allied arts. It states that yuvarāja Jayasiṁghadēva (the younger brother of Vikramāditya) was governing the two Six hundreds, Banavasi Twelve-thousand and Sāntaḷige Thousand. It may be noted that Jayasiṁgha is given all the Pallava titles. The gift was made for the beatitude of Jōgiyabbe, the mother of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© suranadiya sasiya jaḷadhiya dharaṇiya bhāskarana puṭṭidandina tīrtthaṁ sirisaila
kaiḷāsada doreyene pulluṇiya janmamaṟivavaroḷare . gaṇapa
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukkā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamāna lōkavikhyāta
pallavānvayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ yuvarājaṁ rājaparamēsva
raṁ vīramahēsvaraṁ vikramābharaṇaṁ jayalakṣmīramaṇaṁ sa
raṇāgatarakṣāmaṇi cāḷukyacūḍāmaṇi kadanatriṇētraṁ kṣa
triyapavitraṁ mattagajāṁgarājaṁ sahajamanōjaṁ ripurā
yakaṭakasūṟekāṟaṁnaṇnanaṁkakāṟaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalla
vīranoḷaṁba pallavapermmānaḍi jayasiṁghadēvar Eraḍaṟu
nūṟumaṁ banavāsipannircchāsiramumaṁ sāntaḷige sāsiraṁ mo
dalāge maleyēḷu koṁbukoba yumaṁ duṣṭanigrahavi
śiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdarasugeyyu
ttire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastagītavādyanṛtyānēkasā
strapādhakaṁ vīranoḷaṁbapādārādhakaṁ mūṟurāya Āsthāna
birudabagekāṟamukadarppaṇaṁ caturvvaṁsabirudabage
kāṟa si rbbakaṁ vandijanakalpavrikṣaṁ pisuṇamūgarivaṁ
joṁpaḷinārāyaṇaṁ bhāvanaṁkakāṟaṁ ḍeṁkeviḷāsaṁ battīsa
rāgabahukaḷābrahmaṁ vāgdēvīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ dānavinōdaṁ
nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmokari barmmayyaṁ
cāḷukyavikramavarssa 3 neya siddhārtta saṁvatsarada caitra su
puṇname Ādivārasaṁkrāntiyandu pulluṇiya tīrtthavaṁ mindu ta
mmabbe jōgiyabbege parōkṣavineyaṁ gaḷagēsvara dēvara ma
ṇḍapada besake 30 gadyāṇa poṁnna koṭṭanī dharmma candrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluge maṁgaḷa mahāśrī . © © © .
Digital edition of SII 18.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
